title: ITALY enforcement action against Sportitalia Società Sportiva Dilettantistica a.r.l. (30,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 30,000 on Sportitalia Società Sportiva Dilettantistica a.r.l. The controller failed to adequately react to a data subject's request to exercise their rights after receiving direct marketing messages. The controller also failed to inform the data subj...
